rect.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke: rgb(134, 134, 134); stroke-opacity: 1;
fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke: rgb(134, 134, 134); stroke-opacity: 1;

text.style: text-transform: none; font-family: Cairo; letter-spacing: normal; font-style: normal; font-weight: 500; white-space: pre; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: rgb(255, 255, 255); direction: rtl; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-opacity: 1;
